name: Crab Custard with Lemon Butter Sauce
recipeIngredient: Broccoli - cut into small florets (3/4 cup)
Crab meat - fresh or frozen, trimmed of cartilage (1/2 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Cook broccoli florets in boiling salted water until tender-crisp; drain.
3. Generously brush ramekins with melted butter.
4. Divide crab meat and broccoli among the ramekins.
5. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, cream, and milk; season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
6. Fill ramekins three-quarters full with the custard.
7. Place in a shallow pan of hot water and bake for 1 hour at 325°F or until set (test with a knife).
8. Make Lemon Butter Sauce:
- In a saucepan, heat white wine and chopped shallot; reduce to 2 tablespoons.
- Reduce heat and whisk in butter slowly until incorporated.
- Whisk in cream and lemon juice.
- Keep warm over hot water.
9. Unmold custard onto plates with Lemon Butter Sauce.
Makes: 6-8 servings
Source: A Taste of Quebec by Julian Armstrong
